HGSS.576.0000:
Sigh... I opened a branch here,
but I can’t sell my Bicycles.\r
Why is that?\f
Could you ride a Bicycle and
advertise for me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.576.0001:
Really? Great!\f
Give me your name and phone number,
and I’ll loan you a Bicycle. [0200,0000]
HGSS.576.0003:
The main shop is at Cerulean
back in Kanto.\f
Say hello to the shop manager
if you happen to go there!\f
Our Bicycles are first-rate!
You can ride them in Kanto, too!
HGSS.576.0004:
Sigh... Oh, for the kindness
of people...
